originalTitle: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
title: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
content: Saadia Mosbah campaigned for migrants, particularly after President Kais Saied said they posed a demographic threat to the country.

originalTitle: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
title: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
content: Some 26 million people are "facing extreme hunger" in Kenya, Ethiopia and Somalia, warns humanitarian organisation Oxfam.

originalTitle: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
title: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
content: It comes during the Nigerian president's state visit to the UK - the first by a west African leader in 37 years.

originalTitle: Iran says it will allow Japanese ships to transit the Strait of Hormuz
title: Iran says it will allow Japanese ships to transit the Strait of Hormuz
content: Japan sources 90 percent of its crude from Middle East and is heavily dependent on exports transiting the key waterway.

originalTitle: Trump hints at ‘winding down’ Iran war as US deploys more troops to region
title: Trump hints at ‘winding down’ Iran war as US deploys more troops to region
content: Trump says he is not looking for a ceasefire with Iran as mixed messages from US president come amid an escalating war.

originalTitle: LIVE: Japan vs Australia – Women’s Asian Cup 2026 final
title: LIVE: Japan vs Australia – Women’s Asian Cup 2026 final
content: Follow our live build-up, with team news, before our text commentary stream of the Women's Asian Cup final.

originalTitle: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
content: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

originalTitle: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
content: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

originalTitle: Remember Chuck Norris memes but never watched his films? You're not alone
title: Remember Chuck Norris memes but never watched his films? You're not alone
content: Chuck Norris became an inadvertent source of humour for a viral online celebration of his movie tough-guy persona.

originalTitle: Man Utd fury at 'astonishing' and 'baffling' penalty decisions
title: Man Utd fury at 'astonishing' and 'baffling' penalty decisions
content: Manchester United are left furious over "astonishing" refereeing decisions as two penalties were given  and one was not in their draw at Bournemouth.

originalTitle: Maguire sent off as Bournemouth fight back to draw with Man Utd
title: Maguire sent off as Bournemouth fight back to draw with Man Utd
content: Despite taking the lead twice, Manchester United are held to a 2-2 draw at Bournemouth and have Harry Maguire sent off as they drop points in the race for a top-four finish in the Premier League.

originalTitle: Klopp, small shinpads and whether he really is boring - Milner in his own words
title: Klopp, small shinpads and whether he really is boring - Milner in his own words
content: James Milner - the Premier League's record appearance holder, speaks to reporter Kelly Somers about his career - including a debut goal for hometown club Leeds, a dramatic Champions League semi-final comeback against Barcelona and returning from nine months out injured.
